'''Vob''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]]–type [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE" /> located in the [[Vob system/Legends|Vob system]], a part of the [[Ktilac Regions/Legends|Ktilac Regions]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was famous for its perpetual [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] storms,<ref name="CSWE" /> which constituted a natural wonder.<ref name="GG2-2">[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin'', Second Edition]]</ref> The Vob [[Star system/Legends|system]] was one of only three [[Star/Legends|star]] systems in the Ktilac Regions—which were governed by the native [[Ktilac]], [[Murachaun]], and [[Tocoyan]] [[Species/Legends|species]]—that was open to outsiders under strict conditions.<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vob was created by [[Christopher Kubasik]] and introduced in ''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]'', a [[1989]] sourcebook published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG2">''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]''</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Vob system, and therefore the planet itself, in grid square N-9.<ref name="TEA" />
